---
title: Writing
description: ""
image: "../../../2_2_assets/writing.png"
date: 2025-11-5
categories: [writing]
---

# Agenda
- [ ] progress overview
    + Layout mostly complete
    + Outline
    + First half of introduction complete ("identifying the problem")
    + Method about flight capture and ground truthing complete
    + discussion about ms calibration 
    + Started working on multiple figures and writing sown bullet points for discussion.

- [ ] **To discuss**
    - difficult to statistically quantify these minimal results
    - "in partial fulfilment of..." what else is there needed?



- [ ] next step:
    - complete method, results (and discussion as bullet points) until end of next week (14/11/25)


# Meeting Notes

- is it even possible to set the exposure setting s for the MS drone
